# Taskgenie Productivity Assistant

> AI-powered workspace for professionals: email drafting, meeting notes summarization, task planning, research briefs, and an AI chat assistant.

## Pages
- [Home / Dashboard](/): Overview of all AI productivity tools.
- [Smart Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails by tone and audience.
- [Meeting Notes Summarizer](/notes): Convert notes into key points, decisions, and actions.
- [AI Task Planner](/planner): Prioritize and schedule tasks.
- [AI Research Assistant](/research): Structured research briefs on any topic.
- [AI Chat](/chat): Conversational assistant.
